package.name: cortex_cognition
package.description: High-level reasoning layer (the "executive"): orchestrator_node sequences a JSON5 scenario's sub-tasks, matches trigger keywords against transcripts, judges success from the perception layer's Verdict, and dispatches each hook to its connector (speak / navigation / vla). Preemption is a two-phase handshake with a pending buffer. Named "cognition", not "reasoning", because the VLA and Gearsonic policies also run inference — this layer is the deliberative one, not every inference in the stack.
